commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the Codex app-server run attempt loop to disarm the short post-tool completion idle watchdog on current-turn follow-up activity or retryable app-server errors, with focused tests and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main arms the short completion watchdog after a dynamic tool response and only clears it on current-turn `turn/completed`, so later current-turn activity can leave the short timeout active until it aborts the run.
commands.review_followup: This PR is opted into automerge, but ClawSweeper already added a human-review pause and exact-head CI still had queued/in-progress checks, so the next step is maintainer review rather than an automated repair.

target.title: fix(codex): stop idle aborts after turn activity
target.author: rubencu

commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an optional `agentId` filter to `cron.list` across the protocol, service, gateway handler, agent cron tool, CLI, and generated Swift protocol models.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main has no `agentId` field in `cron.list`, and the PR defect is reproducible from code because cron add/edit normalize stored agent IDs while the new list filter compares the raw requested value.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blockers are narrow mechanical repairs suitable for an automated follow-up on the PR branch or a replacement branch.

target.title: feat(cron): add agentId filtering to cron list
target.author: zhanggttry
